name: command npm run intent -- plan draft "Governance integrity hardening" --objective "Block repository escapes, preserve 1000+ observations, serialize Run/Trace updates, and align product contracts" --problem "Three executable integrity defects and three documented contract drifts remain after the autonomy phase" --scope "src/runtime/scope.ts,src/runtime/observability.ts,src/runtime/evals.ts,src/runtime/runs.ts,src/runtime/schemas.ts,src/utils/json.ts,hooks/pre-write-guard.ts,src/cli/index.ts,tests/**,README.md,AGENT.md,AGENTS.md,CLAUDE.md,skills/**,docs/**,hyohyeon-harness-최종목표.md" --step "Add canonical repository-relative containment and hook denial" --step "Generalize sequential ID parsing and add per-record locks" --step "Clarify enforceable Contract fields and align RunState SSOT" --step "Add boundary, concurrency, and dogfood regression tests" --test-strategy "Targeted boundary/concurrency tests followed by typecheck, full suite, coverage, and pack audit" --check "typecheck:npm run typecheck" --check "unit_test:npm test" --dod "All seven Intent DoD items are evidenced" --risk "Cross-process lock stale recovery must not deadlock" --risk "Historical phase documents must remain historical"
